mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hm_query.tax_rates_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, hsn_code, description, gst_rate, cess_rate, tcs_rate, effective_from, effective_to, active ) SELECT tr.id, tr.tenant, NOW(), tr.hsn_code, tr.description, tr.gst_rate, tr.cess_rate, tr.tcs_rate, tr.effective_from, tr.effective_to, tr.active FROM hm_tax.tax_rates tr

INSERT INTO hm_query.tax_category_mappings_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, product_category, sub_category, hsn_code, description ) SELECT tcm.id, tcm.tenant, NOW(), tcm.product_category, tcm.sub_category, tcm.hsn_code, tcm.description FROM hm_tax.tax_category_mapping tcm

INSERT INTO hm_query.tax_regions_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, state_code, state_name, state_alpha, union_territory, active ) SELECT tr.id, tr.tenant, NOW(), tr.state_code, tr.state_name, tr.state_alpha, tr.union_territory, tr.active FROM hm_tax.tax_regions tr

INSERT INTO hm_query.tax_exemptions_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, exemption_type, exemption_value, description, full_exemption, active ) SELECT te.id, te.tenant, NOW(), te.exemption_type, te.exemption_value, te.description, te.full_exemption, te.active FROM hm_tax.tax_exemptions te

INSERT INTO hm_query.order_tax_lines_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, order_id, variant_id, hsn_code, tax_type, taxable_amount, gst_rate, cgst_amount, sgst_amount, igst_amount, cess_amount, tcs_amount, total_tax ) SELECT otl.id, otl.tenant, NOW(), otl.order_id, otl.variant_id, otl.hsn_code, otl.tax_type, otl.taxable_amount, otl.gst_rate, otl.cgst_amount, otl.sgst_amount, otl.igst_amount, otl.cess_amount, otl.tcs_amount, otl.total_tax FROM hm_tax.order_tax_lines otl
